positive: Minimalist, highly detailed symmetrical abstract representation of a celestial fauna, featuring a stylized crescent moon tiger and a nebula fox leaping together. The composition should be centered, with clean, thick silhouettes against a contrasting background. Use deep sapphire blues, luminous gold, and cosmic magenta accents. The art style should blend Japanese Ukiyo-e ink wash techniques with modern vaporwave geometric patterns, creating high contrast and dramatic energy. Perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Intricate linework, clean edges, crisp detail, isolated subject on solid color background.
